name: O-13 --emit writes a jsonl report with one finding per line
command: mkdir -p src && printf 'const c = tokens.color.legacy.red;\n' > src/c.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/design-token-freshness.sh" --registry "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/design-tokens/registry.yaml" --paths src --emit report.jsonl 2>err.txt && [ -s report.jsonl ] && node -e 'const lines=require("fs").readFileSync("report.jsonl","utf8").split("\n").filter(Boolean);for(const l of lines)JSON.parse(l);process.stdout.write("lines="+lines.length)' > out.txt && grep -q 'lines=1' out.txt && echo emitted 1>&2
